summary: Iteration 11 testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Settings page refactor verified with 3 tabs (Finance Tracker, Accounting, Appearance & Data). Company edit moved from AccountingDashboard dialog to Settings Accounting tab. Default categories expanded to 48 (55 total with old defaults). FY endpoint working. AI categorize bug fixed (TypeError in f-string).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/categories returns categories list with id, name, category_type, color, is_default
Backend: GET /api/categories auto-restores defaults if empty
Backend: POST /api/categories/restore-defaults restores missing default categories
Backend: Categories have expanded defaults (48 new categories)
Backend: GET /api/financial-years returns FY list with current_fy
Backend: FY dates computed from voucher/transaction date ranges
Backend: GET /api/company returns company details
Backend: PUT /api/company updates company details (name, address, gstin, pan, cin)
Backend: POST /api/ai-categorize returns prompt_used in response
Backend: POST /api/ai-categorize with empty transaction_ids works
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Settings page has 3 tabs (Finance Tracker, Accounting, Appearance & Data)
Frontend: Settings Finance Tracker tab shows Email Auto-Scan section
Frontend: Settings Finance Tracker tab shows Categories section with Restore button
Frontend: Settings Accounting tab shows Company Details form (name, address, gstin, pan, cin)
Frontend: Settings Accounting tab shows Financial Year section with current FY and FY list
Frontend: Settings Accounting tab shows FY Starts In dropdown (April default)
Frontend: Settings Appearance & Data tab shows 5 themes (Light, Dark, Forest, Ocean, Sand)
Frontend: Settings Appearance & Data tab shows Backup & Restore section
Frontend: Settings Appearance & Data tab shows Mobile App section
Frontend: Settings Appearance & Data tab shows Danger Zone with Reset All Data
Frontend: Accounting Dashboard shows company name and FY badge
Frontend: Accounting Dashboard has Company Settings link that navigates to /settings
Frontend: Accounting Dashboard has NO edit company dialog (correctly moved to Settings)
Frontend: Categories page shows 55 categories (10 old + 45 new expanded defaults)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed AI categorize f-string bug on line 1954)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified the Settings page refactor: (1) Settings now has 3 tabs - Finance Tracker (email config, categories restore), Accounting (company details, FY selector), Appearance & Data (themes, backup, danger zone). (2) Company edit dialog removed from AccountingDashboard, replaced with 'Company Settings' link to /settings. (3) Default categories expanded from 10 to 48 (total 55 with old defaults). (4) FY endpoint returns list of financial years computed from data. (5) AI categorize endpoint fixed - was throwing TypeError due to f-string bug. (6) All APIs require authentication.

bug_fixed.description: AI categorize endpoint was returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fixed.root_cause: TypeError: unhashable type 'dict' in f-string on line 1954 - list comprehension was incorrectly formatted with double braces
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed f-string to use the pre-formatted descriptions variable directly instead of inline list comprehension
